arguments.name: msbuild-review
arguments.prompt:
Review all MSBuild project files in this .NET solution for anti-patterns, duplication, modernization opportunities, and best practices violations. The solution is at /tmp/sv-8bcfa1016c764b5da45cd127e08a1f90/ContosoApp.sln with source in src/ and tests in test/.

Specifically look for:
1. Duplicated properties across .csproj files (TargetFramework, LangVersion, Nullable, ImplicitUsings, package versions, etc.)
2. Opportunities to introduce Directory.Build.props / Directory.Build.targets to centralize settings
3. Opportunities for NuGet Central Package Management (Directory.Packages.props)
4. Anti-patterns like hardcoded paths, restating SDK defaults, Exec instead of built-in tasks
5. Modernization opportunities (legacy patterns that can be simplified)
6. Any other MSBuild best practices violations

Scan all .csproj, .props, .targets, and .sln files. Produce actionable improvement suggestions with concrete before/after examples where appropriate.

# MSBuild Project File Review — ContosoApp Solution

## Solution Structure

| File | SDK |
|------|-----|
| `src/ContosoApp.Core/ContosoApp.Core.csproj` | Microsoft.NET.Sdk |
| `src/ContosoApp.Api/ContosoApp.Api.csproj` | Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web |
| `src/ContosoApp.Services/ContosoApp.Services.csproj` | Microsoft.NET.Sdk |
| `test/ContosoApp.Core.Tests/ContosoApp.Core.Tests.csproj` | Microsoft.NET.Sdk |
| `test/ContosoApp.Api.Tests/ContosoApp.Api.Tests.csproj` | Microsoft.NET.Sdk |

**No `Directory.Build.props`, `Directory.Build.targets`, `Directory.Packages.props`, `global.json`, or `.editorconfig` found.**

---

## 🔴 Errors (Likely to cause issues)

### 1. Package Version Inconsistency — `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions`

The same package is referenced at **different versions** across projects:

| Project | Version |
|---------|---------|
| `ContosoApp.Core` | **8.0.0** |
| `ContosoApp.Api` | **8.0.0** |
| `ContosoApp.Services` | **8.0.1** |

This can lead to binding redirect failures, diamond-dependency problems at runtime, and confusing "method not found" exceptions.

### 2. Test Framework Version Skew

The two test projects use **different versions** of the test infrastructure:

| Package | `Core.Tests` | `Api.Tests` |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` | **17.10.0** | **17.9.0** |
| `xunit` | **2.8.1** | **2.7.1** |
| `xunit.runner.visualstudio` | **2.8.1** | **2.5.6** |

This causes inconsistent test behavior and makes debugging failures across test projects harder.

---

## 🟡 Warnings (Anti-patterns that should be fixed)

### 3. Massive Property Duplication Across All 5 Projects

**Every single project** repeats this identical block:

```xml
<TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
<LangVersion>latest</LangVersion>
<Nullable>enable</Nullable>
<ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
<TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
<EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
<Company>Contoso</Company>
<Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
```

**Impact**: Any change (e.g., upgrading to `net9.0`) requires editing 5 files. High risk of drift (as already seen in package versions).

### 4. Duplicated Custom Target — `PrintBuildInfo`

The same target is copy-pasted in all 3 `src/` projects:

```xml
<Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build">
  <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
</Target>
```

This target also lacks `Inputs`/`Outputs` attributes, meaning it executes on **every** build regardless of whether anything changed. While it's a simple `Message` task (minimal cost), the pattern violates incremental build best practices and the duplication itself is the real problem.

### 5. Duplicated `DocumentationFile` Property

All 3 `src/` projects repeat:
```xml
<DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
```

This should be centralized.

### 6. No Central Package Management (CPM)

With 5 projects and 7+ distinct packages, scattered `Version="..."` attributes make it extremely easy for versions to drift — **which has already happened** (see Error #1 and #2 above).

### 7. `LangVersion` set to `latest` explicitly

For .NET 8 SDK projects, `LangVersion` defaults to the language version matching the target framework. Setting `latest` can cause accidental use of preview language features and different behavior on different SDK installations. Either pin to `12` (the C# version for .NET 8) or remove it to accept the SDK default.

---

## 🔵 Suggestions (Improvements for maintainability)

### 8. Missing `global.json`

No `global.json` means the build depends on whatever SDK happens to be installed. Pin the SDK version for reproducible builds:

```json
{
  "sdk": {
    "version": "8.0.300",
    "rollForward": "latestFeature"
  }
}
```

### 9. Missing `.editorconfig`

With `EnforceCodeStyleInBuild` enabled in all projects but no `.editorconfig`, there are no code style rules to enforce. This property does nothing without corresponding rules.

### 10. `xunit.runner.visualstudio` missing `PrivateAssets="all"`

Test runner packages are development-only tools and should not flow to consumers (if test projects are ever referenced or packed):

```xml
<PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="..." PrivateAssets="all" />
```

---

## 🟢 Positive (Things done well)

- ✅ All projects are **SDK-style** (modern format)
- ✅ `Nullable` is enabled everywhere (null safety)
- ✅ `ImplicitUsings` enabled (clean code files)
- ✅ `TreatWarningsAsErrors` enabled (build hygiene)
- ✅ Test projects properly set `IsPackable` to `false`
- ✅ ProjectReferences use relative paths (portable)
- ✅ No legacy patterns (no `packages.config`, no `AssemblyInfo.cs` explicit files)

---

## 📋 Recommended Fix: Introduce Build Infrastructure

### Step 1: Create `Directory.Build.props` (repo root)

```xml
<Project>

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <LangVersion>12</LangVersion>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
    <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
    <Company>Contoso</Company>
    <Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- All src projects produce XML docs -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="!$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- All test projects are not packable -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>
```

### Step 2: Create `Directory.Build.targets` (repo root)

```xml
<Project>

  <Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build"
          Condition="!$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
  </Target>

</Project>
```

### Step 3: Create `Directory.Packages.props` (repo root)

```xml
<Project>

  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <!-- Shared -->
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.5" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Swashbuckle.AspNetCore" Version="6.5.0" />

    <!-- Test -->
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.10.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="NSubstitute" Version="5.1.0" />
  </ItemGroup>

</Project>
```

### Step 4: Simplified Project Files (After)

**`src/ContosoApp.Core/ContosoApp.Core.csproj`** — before 27 lines → after 10 lines:
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  </ItemGroup>

</Project>
```

  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <ProjectReference Include="..\ContosoApp.Core\ContosoApp.Core.csproj" />
    <ProjectReference Include="..\ContosoApp.Services\ContosoApp.Services.csproj" />
  </ItemGroup>

```

**`src/ContosoApp.Services/ContosoApp.Services.csproj`**:
```xml

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" />

  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <ProjectReference Include="..\ContosoApp.Core\ContosoApp.Core.csproj" />
  </ItemGroup>

```

```xml

  <ItemGroup>
